rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors by making assertions about prior work without verifying cited numbers.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
